diagrams.title: AVL Tree Rotation Cases
diagrams.description: Four rotation types: LL (single right), RR (single left), LR (double), RL (double) showing before and after states
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how rotations restructure tree while maintaining BST property

diagrams.title: Red-Black Tree Properties
diagrams.description: Sample Red-Black tree showing color properties, NIL leaves, and black-height on paths
diagrams.purpose: Understand color constraints and black-height property

diagrams.title: B-Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Multi-level B-Tree showing keys in internal and leaf nodes, children as separators
elements: Internal nodes with keys and children
diagrams.purpose: Understand multi-way branching and balance property

diagrams.title: B-Tree Split Operation
diagrams.description: Step-by-step showing a full node being split into two and middle key moving to parent
elements: Parent node with inserted middle key
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how overflow is handled in B-Trees
